questions.question: What is the definition of Machine Learning?
options: The development of systems that learn from data
questions.correct_answer: The development of systems that learn from data
questions.explanation: Machine Learning is primarily focused on creating systems that can learn from and make predictions based on data.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of supervised learning?
options: Predicting house prices based on features
questions.correct_answer: Predicting house prices based on features
questions.explanation: Supervised learning involves learning from labeled data, such as predicting outcomes based on input features.

questions.question: In machine learning, overfitting occurs when a model learns the ___ too well.
questions.explanation: Overfitting happens when a model captures noise and details in the training data, which adversely affects its performance on new data.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a train/test split?
options: To increase the size of the dataset
To evaluate the performance of the model
questions.correct_answer: To evaluate the performance of the model
questions.explanation: A train/test split is used to separate a dataset into two parts: one for training the model and the other for testing its performance.

questions.question: In machine learning, the ___ is the output variable that the model aims to predict.
questions.explanation: The label is the target variable that machine learning models try to predict based on input features.
